name: McCaskill HQ
subject: matching ALL gifts!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
Friend - **a group of donors is matching every dollar you give to the campaign before our mid-month deadline on Thursday to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat. But we're still $20,000 short of our goal, and time's running out to get your gift doubled.**
We need you to take advantage of this opportunity. _The Washington Post_ ranks our race as the No. 1 Senate toss-up of this year, and the GOP is doing everything it can to make sure Claire loses. President Trump even flew to Missouri and headlined a fundraiser for her opponent, Josh Hawley.
**Claire 's depending on your donation to run a campaign that can win. Will you give $5 or more right now - and have your gift DOUBLED - to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat?
**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1223-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)**

**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1223-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I’ll be upfront with you -- I’m asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- My team and I are always going to be upfront with you when we’re asking for your help. It’s that time again, but we are just a few months away from Election Day now. **And unlike a lot of campaigns, we’re not going to use shocking subject lines, all caps text, or threatening language to scare you into chipping in.** [**I wanted to give you that heads up because we have an important fundraising deadline on Friday, so you’ll be getting a few more emails from my team asking you to pitch in donations of $10 or whatever amount you think is best.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1901079/9971205/787029393?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzlmODUxYy1jYjlmLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtqmHG9RWBTj4tC7bZfwipA5c_JsG2TAM65rHgRig9s=&refcode=em180814-mm3-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10) It might seem like these come up quite a bit -- that’s why I wanted to explain why deadlines like this one matter so much to our campaign to bring common sense back to Washington. **This will only take a moment.** Right now, we are at a crossroads in our country. Washington is broken, and too many politicians out there are playing partisan games. Meanwhile, hard-working families in Tennessee and across our country are facing real problems. People are working longer hours, but their paycheck doesn’t stretch as far as it used to. Too many families can’t afford health insurance, and the opioid crisis is killing more people annually in Tennessee than car accidents. Congress is paralyzed by hyper-partisanship, but keeps racking up debt for our kids and grandkids with no end in sight. **Things may look bleak -- but I know that by coming together to get things done, we can actually make things better.** As governor, I did just that, working with Democrats and Republicans to create jobs and make critical investments in health care and our schools -- even in the middle of the Great Recession. Every step of the way, Tennesseans were ready to work together to get it done. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to bring that kind of pragmatic leadership to Washington so we can fix Congress. That’s why I’m asking for your support. [**Can you chip in $10 to our campaign ahead of this deadline? Your donations are what’s giving our campaign the resources we need to bring Tennesseans together in this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1901080/9971206/787029393?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzlmODUxYy1jYjlmLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtqmHG9RWBTj4tC7bZfwipA5c_JsG2TAM65rHgRig9s=&refcode=em180814-mm3-full&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1901081/9971207/787029393?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzlmODUxYy1jYjlmLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtqmHG9RWBTj4tC7bZfwipA5c_JsG2TAM65rHgRig9s=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180814-mm3-full-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: The President and I spoke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Please participate in this special project. |
---
| | | | | | |
Friend,

The President recently polled Americans to hear what you feel is the most important issue for the 2018 midterm elections.

I asked him if I could share the results with you... _Immigration ranked number one._

Now we'd like to go one step further. We'd like your input on a comprehensive strategy to win the 2018 Midterm Elections and ensure President Trump can elect more allies of our agenda and fight to Make America Great Again!

**[Can I ask for your help in planning our election strategy by taking our 2018 Grassroots Victory Survey.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cbf2051d88c3b7c9c042c250a5e538cd77f4c0d83da75ffaca9852a5a2a5eb7ed2ff46e80baf0c222cabc0cdbef9feeba3fdfc8e7bf370d)**

I have never witnessed an election where the opposing party is this unhinged.

The Left is fired up and the base is willing to do whatever it takes to usher in a blue wave.

The clearest sign of liberal energy is the election of self-avowed socialists in Democrat primaries.

**That 's why, as President Trump says, we simply cannot get complacent.**

While the President and I take our America First message on the national stage, we're counting on you to lead the grassroots during this pivotal election year.

Will you lead?

**[Please complete our 2018 Grassroots Victory Survey today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0cbf2051d88c3b7c1ed947261d8df738b4e93fa97b58c4e978ebd3e3361f72e1908d064c511a697c92ad5ba41a29a270d7030e44fe188d10)**

Thank you,

clean_body: Please participate in this special project. | | | | | | | | Friend, The President recently polled Americans to hear what you feel is the most important issue for the 2018 midterm elections. I asked him if I could share the results with you... Immigration ranked number one. Now we'd like to go one step further. We'd like your input on a comprehensive strategy to win the 2018 Midterm Elections and ensure President Trump can elect more allies of our agenda and fight to Make America Great Again! I have never witnessed an election where the opposing party is this unhinged. The Left is fired up and the base is willing to do whatever it takes to usher in a blue wave. The clearest sign of liberal energy is the election of self-avowed socialists in Democrat primaries. That 's why, as President Trump says, we simply cannot get complacent. While the President and I take our America First message on the national stage, we're counting on you to lead the grassroots during this pivotal election year. Will you lead? Thank you, Newt Gingrich Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

body:
Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test.

Friend, your support has helped us get here today.

Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test.

In just 14 hours, the polls close. We’ll know who will take on Senator Baldwin in November.

And it'll be over.

**But we're not there just yet... we've still got to win this thing today. **

First off, if you need help finding your polling place, please visit **[myvote.wi.gov](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I41SYdaqNIjjfjns7t_wqIQe7tnYeNg_LR_DKPip6Oapp4QwLdQ41hQ7lQRsQZBMhkrYu8wW83SSiCHcij3NGlTZcgUrDYHkcxA1s6a3EumwEYcgSx3T081kg9dsygfkc8t036wpFdmewkf792WCfgO41rgCcf49Rqm6X06IvtcQzIIvMbhESkXs4OAhKI2K4TOJXvhYhqHdBa-si2Hiiph06BAZ7rn4WsJI-S1P1NErNXnfXVOmP1RE5e-7UIiFJ5Q%3D%3D)** and remember to head to your voting location before 8 p.m. Don’t forget to take your photo ID with you!

But right now, we've got hundreds of volunteers in the field working to get out the vote and they're not stopping till polls close at 8.

I know today is a busy day for so many of us, but I have to ask you for a big favor, friend. [**Will you chip in $5, $10, or $50 for get out the vote efforts?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I40sUR3cuH2wB8kuCbi7-JPR0tFIEa1NNfCfigxZjaw3Lozp8w7NDGpJiOzFjQFpND5747LJxEcgzZzZoH0dTzIq-nrDXusRXXAQ919HT6bjpO13B3qB2uaPiID6svmvpp8Cp5RG91HPlOT47ytEbKpwNLl4bXOKdO8XJsL0s1RNKrYqTr3ioJfHBTePtSuZMSYPT0PYQMv7lzDuQEBo1fG0Oh5-wWTaU7FLgqhbaoNwao-kwMtuNzeKBovieB76VMOCJ2A0Uas209XI0N3jm0BcUvKB2Knr5ADhKmV9Zb2MlP2ldjRwsthg9PgRmkkT9IGxouQsnWOM4VijZj7BDzyZO_qBAB9n-yaUM7yxMeJ02Tz9lIhtV-IFsphd-bkBSH59GBA8fWHoIRPtzvkOX_VE%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=eoP_3zD-u8PiL0JtEgTBDEy5G87ebv3wgyS4ctJPq27c1j6APyRY37h729vs1wQ4UccSFsmUhzOf9C1XQWpBNyqDHmc6kw6YzOLEHNRCI4R96gk3Y0F-bJVPveSBZD6qqtr42-NSX6_H3-xbxSJ9cmq9-VGlKH-jWEMDHmA8qJ7PhVuStzP_s-h-jLm0wgwAWY7EvoWqe6TSD8MhaNowVmT6q8aH9waLVfjCmkMya7AX2xxUQ-YlqLR1yHE2YiVY). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I4yryrXaC-dq5Fhfa2Td8pgvzC27v5tc_6EA-2HynipxHaUAx-XsFj8aOMTGNxuw648LwOUmojSBUBm2CwQDgGedud-F9ZvE2u6eQ3SDzNhxy6XjFUZqele_pMBKAZgrFCQ6LXtfcVJ9C3rlvEW8GfFJIWrQCwnaghz7Vl1vWL-WnhwVd6iD35qg7JU64vIrLcsQlSHwemJseXpp-TSG-ePAyjpI-ePtYVAfgbA2c-RKIjSCKt_MsXzVzrllYCLiq1VIJ_qdi8ZNciT2FpPgZSev6KgwWvDPBv5r8Zlij7ZQ065sgZWkgBvrd6uBCDm_MM8na5RhTZ3mLzN3ybDbzjju6qyvlkrMw1d8RSLc3lQKL) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I4yryrXaC-dq5Fhfa2Td8pgvqB2MfWic6jb7IDIbTrZPc4yAwx6sszbWFL81aJAU26jHec7kSAA-xtSWSuVLcolLtavQYVmdWy_SYUkWHFz0CqFQ4ausw4EoryUT9ywjdnHODL8hxfZdXXD6XBKVgRmmLHGDoNtWUBLazVroHMIKUPZNpV8VQNw8vXlqJbc316YqWnHLuNr_3boTMdSITaNmgzMasGpOz3LpbSdWDMTEnV5vo_m-Wo0Sa-1apK8vNpF-dd78uN1ON2O9dIcVlzV-mzHIjxhRr7pNe_enVgjFmpM79NunFYpPYMdJA3gPQ4GNJ1uAdVxPYfFAmmQ_-0j36ANdk6dI_QX5lyqfW56-m) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I4zmEpMUhJzZOc8vRQHv2ZzHMbqDE4Vd7W7Vq7Q7KjE7gBfuVIEFDv4grXgNq1iFZd9PKYeGXtYBZJi4rwk63pPJb1B2kSkJNcROa290QnlWZXiLMGZ-IVVNfABpu_T9GkvcFzG1MUE3i34eeprmMhTde8_U-Oa05it7Q4gUBRoPkula778ht_FHY6fMs2koYlSUO773jElAnu06ZNt5Q6as3_S7uGRJ53mjwa5rLiixPtDQTGecpmooNSCDAOAqJqA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I42f2xhkTu-UaJUn_1SICATrVeK8owKOwZTNTVE1Cb3QZJeiRrXqdp_aDEssc-Lfy_fSrK9wd7WwG0Umbe1l-Kf3H-uLT8xLCxppPocqZe5d0Wh_GuipJpBL3JQ99Ho0XBlScf-awVlLrx1a6YV6oyq-E3S5fGcX_zWrBsEBGU-5NdhAZAA1gX2lVmeeF6L0Tqo0yFn-PEg_TGjkOyfPM71rT_8Z3ZXM3RhO-YaDEm1aBwLTGVNcY44zn0iMnq_nlUA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I41gIo7-guVbu70sa599c9RcNazlNBP78fZ_GeF21GgACzsI71YGO0BmqL0QFh4VAZP2ypJgen9PHOVWSNy5juM1H88IebiIaur2zAfm-q9FxNNLy28C_DezeOubMKx1AdmI6bGkJGXCZnyHOvEFpJeolP-EAvaOcK7hmrC5da3zPQIgU8ksJMYZelfXip4-fQleUBhDcHVKHe2mcDEtVvV0uvf_WIlLCmYnkzlGgOKMvgbl4MTIxeWRdV5u20syc5A%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=F_7gNOiTU_JzSPfNMY3I4yryrXaC-dq5Fhfa2Td8pgt3yCKXiXTwdCCXTUWIadXsADhZk1C6iyxZFdubAWqgM25MVOejOTtpdI8U980Dew7DA-0iZops_7aTT_-QaA9VYuJvyRYnR2abvLeDyAQ0QOx5rbt4--xlOJfr1_K-TGEjElF6CGY2dVv2gOGQSqrMo7OBgE8V8ZpV8vGyIT_Vr0_9-uR2OliwGceLQD0VaKY2c0wNM85seF6rhE1kcFjqfFJ2obe3JWjVMFZuovNzgHY-tipgCSJI3pGD-ftGQ6JkBijYYK-a2GV1O_whROGDI1PeT76RHi5A_IlHosJaL6vrnZBY48Ifpw8aMjs49tv6kdSKo8m9UROEpdaE5WdkivXJzm_faZSjLl7qzWIQqg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=eoP_3zD-u8PiL0JtEgTBDEy5G87ebv3wgyS4ctJPq27c1j6APyRY37h729vs1wQ4UccSFsmUhzOf9C1XQWpBNyqDHmc6kw6YzOLEHNRCI4R96gk3Y0F-bJVPveSBZD6qqtr42-NSX6_H3-xbxSJ9cmq9-VGlKH-jWEMDHmA8qJ7PhVuStzP_s-h-jLm0wgwAWY7EvoWqe6TSD8MhaNowVmT6q8aH9waLVfjCmkMya7AX2xxUQ-YlqLR1yHE2YiVY) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=07eaf8c7776145b09f8286182351bb05&_e=eoP_3zD-u8PiL0JtEgTBDEy5G87ebv3wgyS4ctJPq27c1j6APyRY37h729vs1wQ4UccSFsmUhzOf9C1XQWpBNyqDHmc6kw6YzOLEHNRCI4R96gk3Y0F-bJVPveSBZD6qqtr42-NSX6_H3-xbxSJ9cmq9-VGlKH-jWEMDHmA8qJ7PhVuStzP_s-h-jLm0wgwAWY7EvoWqe6TSD8MhaNowVmT6q8aH9waLVfjCmkMya7AX2xxUQ-YlqLR1yHE2YiVY) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test. Friend, your support has helped us get here today. Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test. In just 14 hours, the polls close. We’ll know who will take on Senator Baldwin in November. And it'll be over. But we're not there just yet... we've still got to win this thing today. First off, if you need help finding your polling place, please visit and remember to head to your voting location before 8 p.m. Don’t forget to take your photo ID with you! But right now, we've got hundreds of volunteers in the field working to get out the vote and they're not stopping till polls close at 8. I know today is a busy day for so many of us, but I have to ask you for a big favor, friend. I am confident that all of our hard work will pay off, friend, and I hope my next email to you will be celebrating our hard-fought victory. Thank you for all of your help, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Amy
subject: Primary Day is here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Primary Day is here! Before polls close, I wanted to write one more time asking for your help in hitting our Primary Day goal. Elise tells me we're almost there.

It would mean a lot to me if you could make a quick donation before tonight. You can give at this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ak-primary**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=UZ3%2FW39zuknCWRUslo%2FA%2BqJLAQRUBVqq)

Thanks,
Amy

PS -- And you better not forget to vote! If you need to look up where your polling place is, simply click here: [ **https://www.sos.state.mn.us/elections-voting/**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=h5dBYBszXDg%2BWsULCsVjhaJLAQRUBVqq)

**[Contribute](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=e02E%2Fs5c7K%2FSFUS1f6yUvXd00uDix59a)**

body:

This election will be one of the most important ones in our lifetime - and will determine whether or not we can move in a forward direction, on a local, state and national level. name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: More small business history
body:
| |
---
The White House • August 14, 2018
## **More small business history**
**Small businesses are a key driver of our economy.** When they succeed, so does America. More than 99 percent of U.S. businesses are small businesses, and they employ a full 48 percent of the American workforce. **Last month, the Trump Boom** put small businesses on the cusp of yet another economic record. Small business owner optimism hit a [_35-year high in July_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE0LjkzNjU3NDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNC45MzY1NzQxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwMTUxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.foxbusiness.com/economy/small-business-optimism-at-35-year-high)—just one-tenth of a point shy of the highest level in the survey’s 45-year history. The all-time record was achieved in July 1983 during the height of the Reagan Revolution. **Much like Reagan** , President Donald J. Trump is shattering old assumptions about America’s economy. The result is a golden age for small businesses, SBA Administrator Linda McMahon writes. “The unemployment rate is a healthy 4 percent, with more Americans entering the job market . . . And for the first time on record, there are more job openings than unemployed people looking for work.” [_What the Trump Boom means, in the words of small business owners_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE0LjkzNjU3NDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNC45MzY1NzQxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwMTUxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/tax-cuts-delivering-relief-small-businesses-need/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# ‘We are not backing down’
**When President Trump signed** the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) yesterday, he accomplished four important things: delivering on a pledge to rebuild our Military, honoring a commitment to put Service Members and their families first, ensuring America is ready to defend against the threats of today and tomorrow, and funding critical operations with our allies. **“The National Defense Authorization Act** is the most significant investment in our military and our warfighters in modern history,” the President said at yesterday’s signing at Fort Drum in New York. “After years of devastating cuts, we’re now rebuilding our military like we never have before, ever.” **Echoing the words of Gen. George Patton,** President Trump said America should never just “hold its position”—it should always be advancing. “America is on the move once again, and we are not backing down.” [_See President Trump watch a military demonstration and speak at Ford Drum._](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE0LjkzNjU3NDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNC45MzY1NzQxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwMTUxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Hpjd0YazkEY) **Get the facts:** [_How this $716 billion investment in American defense will be spent_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE0LjkzNjU3NDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNC45MzY1NzQxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwMTUxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-rebuilding-readying-military-defend-threats/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks prior to signing the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2019 at the Wheeler-Sack Army Air Field in Fort Drum, NY** | August 13, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE0LjkzNjU3NDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNC45MzY1NzQxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwMTUxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE0LjkzNjU3NDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNC45MzY1NzQxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwMTUxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE0LjkzNjU3NDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNC45MzY1NzQxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcwMTUxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Paul Davis
subject: Washington has spiraled out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5OO0ynsqY04dlNohwoxa2pzGAQ1U3IMd4dnLWLbFk0=/1rY0ob3ctjd990zcpJzqE61XRYxxemCQKsGXWEienQc=?gpsid=13_36_2695&refcode=em18_180814_pstPri_fnd_gq_resend__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180814_pstPri_fnd_gq_resend__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

Last fall I decided to run for Congress because the dysfunction of Washington has spiraled out of control, and I couldn't sit back and do nothing. I've lived in Kansas all my life. It's where I learned to be a good neighbor, stand up for my community, and work together to solve problems. We need more of those Kansas values in Washington.

In the Kansas Legislature, I proved that I can bring both parties together to get things done. By building consensus and working across party lines, I helped pass a balanced budget, cut Kansas' property taxes, and fought back against Sam Brownback's repeated cuts to our public schools.

I'm ready to step up and fight for Kansas, but Steve Watkins and the Washington establishment are prepared to spend whatever it costs to protect their broken system. Out-of-state dark money is scheduled to start flowing into our district today -- and we know these groups won't hesitate to spread mistruths or ugly lies. But the last thing Kansas needs is another politician who just takes marching orders from dark money groups that funnel millions of dollars into their campaigns. We need independent leaders who will prioritize Kansas families over special interests.

**[I'm ready for change in D.C., and I know you are too. So please, chip in $5 or more now and let's keep the momentum going.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5OO0ynsqY04dlNohwoxa2pzGAQ1U3IMd4dnLWLbFk0=/1rY0ob3ctjd990zcpJzqE61XRYxxemCQKsGXWEienQc=?gpsid=13_36_2695&refcode=em18_180814_pstPri_fnd_gq_resend__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180814_pstPri_fnd_gq_resend__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Paul

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5OO0ynsqY04dlNohwoxa2pzGAQ1U3IMd4dnLWLbFk0=/1rY0ob3ctjd990zcpJzqE61XRYxxemCQKsGXWEienQc=?gpsid=13_36_2695&refcode=em18_180814_pstPri_fnd_gq_resend__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180814_pstPri_fnd_gq_resend__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Deadly gun blueprints
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nbj2-MzNTOfa0nz98Dik6xS1NuJR2jYookGBiAmWKwY=/7N37ev1D-Q2cacCGeC_AvJlmUXPGmzR-MQghinOvN94=)

Peter, I take my job to best serve the American people very seriously.

When I heard that the State Department is now allowing anyone to print a gun at home, I was outraged. This is an incredible threat to everyone's personal safety. This is out of the department's legal authority.

Allowing people to obtain a gun without a license or background check, or without a way to be traced by law enforcement must not be allowed.

People should not be able to print guns at home.

_**[We need to put serious pressure on the Trump administration now more than ever. Will you click here to let me know that you 're not afraid to tell the State Department to end this dangerous policy?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nbj2-MzNTOfa0nz98Dik6xS1NuJR2jYookGBiAmWKwY=/usSRpR_RYlcgiB49GR4BE7b--Vc5wXe0AYiUI_ScaFk=)**_

The State Department previously banned access to 3D gun blueprints because doing so would violate the Arms Control Export Act of 1974. Under Trump's Administration, it seems that the State Department decided to change its mind.

My colleagues and I sent a letter urging Secretary of State Mike Pompeo to protect the American people and ban access to 3D gun blueprints.

Far too many people are victims of preventable gun violence. _**[We cannot allow just anyone to own a gun. Add your name if you agree.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nbj2-MzNTOfa0nz98Dik6xS1NuJR2jYookGBiAmWKwY=/7N37ev1D-Q2cacCGeC_AvJlmUXPGmzR-MQghinOvN94=)**_

Thank you for standing with me.

Mike
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nbj2-MzNTOfa0nz98Dik6xS1NuJR2jYookGBiAmWKwY=/-RR5WERX0i7DaayQ0rz_NcTp6C1HJ5np8UbCw-il6ag=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_WL_180814_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

name: Shailene Woodley
subject: Ben was arrested one year ago.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
It's how I know Ben's the fighter Maryland needs.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b9e/3670905277/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A") Friend, A good test for how strongly you feel about something is what you'd risk for it. That's how I know Ben cares so much -- like me, he's been arrested for protesting injustices. In October 2017, on Indigenous Peoples' Day, I was arrested protesting with Native Americans against the Dakota Access Pipeline in North Dakota. I won't lie, it was scary -- but I knew how important this fight was, and it was worth risking everything for because everything was already at risk for Native Americans in North Dakota. One year ago tomorrow, Ben was arrested at the White House at a rally for DREAMers, which was not even the first time that he was arrested for civil disobedience. That's because he cares so much about fighting for people who need our protection and our help -- it's that same spirit that will make him an amazing governor. [**Ben needs to raise $10,000 by Thursday's mid-month deadline, and I hope you'll join me and show your support with a donation of $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b9e/3670905277/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b99/3670905277/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148Aamp;amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b98/3670905277/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A&amount=25&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b9b/3670905277/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A&amount=50&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b9a/3670905277/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b85/3670905277/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b84/3670905277/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A&express_lane=true")
---
The issues that matter to us have never needed our voices more -- that's why I haven't hesitated to speak up and speak out since my arrest.
We need more leaders like Ben who aren't afraid to take on the big fights, and make big, bold progress for people who have been left behind. Working families and people of color don't need the status quo -- they need a fighter.
Ben's exactly that kind of fighter. He didn't hesitate to lead a march for DREAMers around the White House a year ago, and he's probably put thousands of miles on his marching shoes since then. He's marched for women, for working families, for DREAMers all throughout Maryland when he's knocked on doors and shared why he's running.
Any less of a fighter would've stayed out of this race -- it's certainly not been easy so far, and it won't get any easier. But you can't keep Ben away from a fight that needs fighting. I admire the hell out of that.
[**I hope you'll join me and support Ben with a donation of $5 or more to help him raise $10,000 before midnight on Thursday -- because it's time to bring the fight back to Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b9e/3670905277/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A")
Thanks,
Shailene Woodley

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b455/7ab0e2c4/7fc2e9e6/349b0b9e/3670905277/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug18-mdmn?refcode=OHQ08148A")

name: Team Menendez
subject: Republicans attempt to jeopardize your financial future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

There is no other way to describe what Bob Hugin and Republicans want to do: They want to take a lot of the hard earned money you have put away into Social Security and use it to pay for the tax cuts they gave to corporations and the wealthy - plain and simple.

When the Social Security program was created 83 years ago today, it was a promise made to our nation's workers that they would retire with dignity and security.

But Bob Hugin supports Republican plans to gut programs like Social Security and then hand over whatever is left to his friends on Wall Street.

Democratic Senator Bob Menendez refuses to let that happen.

[**It's never mattered more to have Bob Menendez fighting for New Jersey families and seniors -- say you're with him by signing the petition to protect Social Security today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca4/3af3c5d/3a1387a7/4ec3e193/1003187465/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/it-s-never-mattered-more-to-protect-social-security?gpsid=5_73_2845&source=em18_180813_SSPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180813_SSPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Its+never+mattered+more+to+have+Bob+Mene") **[Add your name](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca4/3af3c5d/3a1387a7/4ec3e192/1003187465/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/it-s-never-mattered-more-to-protect-social-security?gpsid=5_73_2845&source=em18_180813_SSPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180813_SSPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name")** Thank you,

body:

clean_body: Derek, Make sure to reserve your spot and be there on Thursday, August 16th at the Grappone Conference Center in Concord. Jack Heath is moderating a serious look at the issues that are important to Republican primary voters. I am confident that our candidates will win in November. Come hear from them this Thursday night! Doors open at 5:15 PM. Sincerely, Juliana BergeronRNC National CommitteewomanNew Hampshire Debate rules and qualifications can be found on the NHGOP Debate webpage. | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

Phil Bredesen knows Tennesseans want that to change, and he’s running to make sure Washington gets back to working together to take on the tough problems facing our communities.

And while our opponent is relying on out-of-state mega-donors to bring the muck and rancor of Washington into this race to divide us, we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help get messages like this one in front of voters.
**That’s why we’re asking:**

name: Josh Fox, Our Revolution
subject: [100,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED] DNC Fossil Fuel Petition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
As California continued to burn through the weekend, DNC Chairman Tom Perez and other party elites poured gasoline on the fire. They reversed the progress you fought for by overturning the DNC's ban o
#
Friends,
As California continued to burn through the weekend, DNC Chairman Tom Perez and other party elites poured gasoline on the fire. They reversed the progress you fought for by overturning the DNC's ban on accepting donations from fossil fuel corporate PACs in a 30-2 vote.
**If we're going to save our planet, we need to be fully committed to 100% renewable energy right now.** A party that accepts money from fossil fuel executives and PACs is inviting climate catastrophe.
**[Tell the DNC: Reinstate the ban on fossil fuel special interest donations and stand with the grassroots climate activists fighting for a sustainable planet.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a98b/bed43eb/7c6d42ba/75fc87b8/436523380/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dnc-fossil-fuel-donations?source=em180814")**
Make no mistake - our climate is in crisis. This summer alone we've seen the largest fire in California history, wildfires in the Arctic forests of Sweden, 91 people killed from wildfires in Greece, and record-breaking heat waves that killed 119 people in Japan, 29 in South Korea, and 65 in Pakistan. We have the most carbon in our atmosphere in the last 800,000 years.
This is why we must change the status quo and challenge the political establishment. We cannot forget the silence of Democratic Party leaders as Water Protectors defended their sacred land at Standing Rock from the Dakota Access Pipeline - Friday's vote is a betrayal of our values. **We demand accountability.**
It is not acceptable to pay lip service to the most existential threat our planet faces and then perpetuate the corrupting influence of corporate PAC money from the fossil fuel industry in our politics.
That's why we're collecting **100,000 signatures** to demonstrate the grassroots opposition to this decision by fossil fuel executives and party elites. **Add your name to our petition >>> [https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dnc-fossil-fuel-donations](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a98b/bed43eb/7c6d42ba/75fc87b8/436523380/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dnc-fossil-fuel-donations?source=em180814")**
Accountability matters. We cannot be afraid of doing what is right, especially when it requires standing up to the privileged and powerful. Our future is at stake.
In solidarity,
Josh Fox
Filmmaker and Environmental Activist
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a98b/bed43eb/7c6d42ba/75fc87b8/436523380/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dnc-fossil-fuel-donations?source=em180814")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a98b/bed43eb/7c6d42ba/75fc87bb/436523380/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a98b/bed43eb/7c6d42ba/75fc87ba/436523380/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a98b/bed43eb/7c6d42ba/75fc87a5/436523380/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a98b/bed43eb/7c6d42ba/75fc87a4/436523380/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

That's why we're launching what may be our most ambitious goal yet: raising $40,000 by midnight tomorrow.

**[If we hit this aggressive 48-hour goal, we'll show our opponents that our grassroots strength can match their out-of-state war chests. Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us meet this crucial goal?](http://act.kyrstensinema. name: Television Ad Alert from Team Kaine
subject: Need to make sure Manassas sees our ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Our opponent is coming after us, so our first ad could not come at a better time. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Derek - our first television ad of the campaign is live! | [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c25/264810471/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND")
---
[[Click any link to see the ad for yourself!]](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c24/264810471/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+any+link+to+see+the+ad+for+yoursel&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND")
And this couldn't have come at a _better_ time:
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c3b/264810471/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND")
---
**" Va. Sen. Kaine's first TV ads focus on economic record amid attacks from Republican opponent"**
Our opponent says that Tim has done nothing to serve the people of Virginia. He also frequently claims that Tim is _bad for the economy_. **Our fact-check meter reads: FALSE.**

So we made an ad that shows just how wrong he is. Tim has been a champion for Career and Technical Education in the Senate, passing laws and opening academies that broaden opportunities for Virginians to learn valuable skills and get to work.

**Derek, we need to make sure Virginians see this ad so they know just how wrong our opponent is. Your donation helps us put this ad in front of undecided voters in more cities in Virginia. Chip in $5 to spread the word:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c3a/264810471/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c39/264810471/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c38/264810471/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND_100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c3f/264810471/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND")
---
Tim always says that launching our TV ads is the most exciting time of the campaign.

It's when we get to push out our message to all Virginians. Your support makes all of this possible as we make sure we can give voters the _truth._

We always think it's important you know where your money goes, and getting Tim and his positive message up on TV is one of the most important things we can do to win [on November 6th](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f129a/3e0906/6f1a7cce/3e357c3e/264810471/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-ad-buy?refcode=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+on+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND&source=20180814_1_FR_TEAM_AdBuy-1-LDND").

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Fellow West Virginian:
It's been a busy week for the Manchin campaign. We've launched a new television ad that shows who we are as West Virginians and what this election is really about, and our team has been working hard across West Virginia.

**New TV Ad**
This week our campaign released a new 60-second television ad called "Disappeared." It focuses on who we are as West Virginians, and Joe Manchin's fight to create good-paying jobs, end the opioid epidemic, and create skills training centers to put people to work. Watch it here.
Joe speaks directly to voters about his commitment to working with both parties to create opportunity all over West Virginia. After all, you can't build our great country up if you are too busy tearing each other down.
[**Watch the ad on Facebook and share it with your social network!**](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftnBIfSmFKZk%2bQQb7%2fWWIXQO5ka4ne1InQT2afEXnSrMzVVwElWG3Uoy5sXRgL3BXjyKFuV%2f%2fcYl6w5g1et3ptSdJl3h1eYydx8%3d)
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftnBIfSmFKZk%2bQQb7%2fWWIXQO5ka4ne1InQT2afEXnSrMzVVwElWG3Uoy5sXRgL3BXjyKFuV%2f%2fcYl6w5g1et3ptSdJl3h1eYydx8%3d)
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftnBIfSmFKZk%2bQQb7%2fWWIXQO5ka4ne1InQT2afEXnSrMzVVwElWG3Uoy5sXRgL3BXjyKFuV%2f%2fcYl6w5g1et3ptSdJl3h1eYydx8%3d)
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftnBIfSmFKZk%2bQQb7%2fWWIXQO5ka4ne1InQT2afEXnSrMzVVwElWG3Uoy5sXRgL3BXjyKFuV%2f%2fcYl6w5g1et3ptSdJl3h1eYydx8%3d "Watch Joe's latest ad!")
**Team Manchin at the WV State Fair**
Our campaign had volunteers out in force at the West Virginia State Fair. It's one of our state's greatest traditions. [**Check out a video of Joe 's visit to the State Fair in Lewisburg.**](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC41lllz%2fgxNCEGQN2TNIMP2MOnjPmTLM3pcP474ceSyAoi3y1viVbCOHDnHT3QdL%2f4R6m00NlTctmhh6i3SyMYUUeoGghW9y4Uw%3d%3d "Click to watch a video of Joe’s visit to the State Fair in Lewisburg.")
See some pictures below.
**Joe Gets Results**
Joe has helped so many West Virginians. Check out this story from Kitte in Grafton, WV. The Senator and his team were able to help Kitte's husband, a Veteran, get out of a terrible nursing home situation. Joe will never stop fighting for West Virginians and this letter is a reminder of the import work he is doing every day to improve the lives of families in our state.
The Exponent Telegram: [Letter: Manchin fights for West Virginians](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON14Dvkkrs9VaHWlLkko8kgi0IpFlL0SbRPxRSCOA0B3xN44vZHnjZjgxBIri3u5rcHnQWpFJ%2b8psyNfOFFcp6YmZMIu9SkGCGNWqmfkTMsDTK8c7Py8%2f8L2nIqwtniaTk633CJfZkYq9duG1yIpZfkJBeBqEU%2bbwQtFVvJj1moJAZ%2f42oj2bD2PTcvIkHo%2faC2GmNQyIF4Bl1txczuSUhIc7bPTSrelwyF21zyTmBhSik%3d)
_I am a Republican, but I called Senator Manchin 's office. And I am so glad I did! By the grace of God, Joe Manchin and his staff (Kim Berry) wasted no time. They cut through the red tape and got my husband out of there... Joe Manchin got my husband out of the home -- free from the suffering he experienced there. My husband is now in the VA hospital. The VA treats him with the dignity and respect he deserves, thanks to Joe Manchin! --Kitte Deakins, Grafton, WV _
Read Kitte's full letter [here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON14Dvkkrs9VaHWlLkko8kgi0IpFlL0SbRPxRSCOA0B3xN44vZHnjZjgxBIri3u5rcHnQWpFJ%2b8psyNfOFFcp6YmZMIu9SkGCGNWqmfkTMsDTK8c7Py8%2f8L2nIqwtniaTk633CJfZkYq9duG1yIpZfkJBeBqEU%2bbwQtFVvJj1moJAZ%2f42oj2bD2PTcvIkHo%2faC2GmNQyIF4Bl1txczuSUhIc7bPTSrelwyF21zyTmBhSik%3d).

Thanks,
Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia
[P.S. Even top Republicans oppose Patrick Morrisey's efforts to take away coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. Watch this video from Sunday's Meet The Press.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftlFZW%2f%2fGDxB02%2bRc9glVeHyZzJQIMRjw%2fihBf7l78Utu9cp4G1KjIPhfO0BL0DR6WiRJIK86ddHjUCmlvDNEuroUfKGkW9cbUg%3d)

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia

Charleston, WV 25361

name: RACE-UPDATE@clairemccaskill.com
subject: Just in (POLL NUMBERS)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
| | |
---
**This just in, Friend:** President Trump has now flown to Missouri FOUR TIMES to campaign for Claire's far-right opponent, Josh Hawley. Trump and the rest of the GOP are so desperate to flip this seat red that they've vowed to do everything they can to kick her out of office.
And it gets worse: **The latest poll shows this race is a _DEAD HEAT_. **
If we lose in Missouri, we'll have no way to stop Trump and McConnell from passing their dangerous agenda. Claire is fighting as hard as she can to stand up to the GOP and protect this senate seat - **but we need to hear from 106 more people on this by midnight tonight, and your response is still missing. Speak up now:**

| | **SHOULD WE PROTECT MISSOURI'S DEMOCRATIC SENATE SEAT?**
---
| | | [YES](https://surveys.signforgood.com/mccaskill-protectthisseat?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1245-su-nd)

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I know life's hectic, but this is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Hi friends, I know August is a busy month. Getting in final vacations before the summer ends. Getting the kids ready to go back to school. But I wanted to let you know about what's going on in Florida. We're 48 hours away from our FEC Pre-Primary Filing Deadline and only 15 days until the Primary itself. _**[We need to get $16,000 into our GOTV Victory Fund by the FEC subject: Social Security or tax cuts for the rich?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
| **INSTANT POLL: Should Congress slash Social Security benefits to pay for the Republicans ' tax cut for the wealthy?**

| [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/1LCnbyeNIc6m7dM-547JUx7h5Y61tGVhI2ENnL7XRv0=/3h_1rbTbclxDcpNJqrnzLrxQmegtD1T8E-gdUkbfdaE=) | | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/1LCnbyeNIc6m7dM-547JUx7h5Y61tGVhI2ENnL7XRv0=/3h_1rbTbclxDcpNJqrnzLrxQmegtD1T8E-gdUkbfdaE=)
---|---|---

* * *

Peter,

House Republicans and Speaker Paul Ryan have long had their eyes on cutting down social security benefits, even though millions of American seniors rely on them just to live a normal life.

But now that they've passed their huge tax cuts for the wealthy, **the GOP wants to slash social security benefits to PAY for the massive deficit their tax breaks have created.**

It's a win-win for them, but a lose-lose for working families.

**Help us prove that social security cuts are NOT what voters want.****Respond here before midnight to be counted:**

**INSTANT POLL: Should Congress slash Social Security benefits to pay for the Republicans ' tax cut for the wealthy?**

| [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/1LCnbyeNIc6m7dM-547JUx7h5Y61tGVhI2ENnL7XRv0=/3h_1rbTbclxDcpNJqrnzLrxQmegtD1T8E-gdUkbfdaE=) | | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/1LCnbyeNIc6m7dM-547JUx7h5Y61tGVhI2ENnL7XRv0=/3h_1rbTbclxDcpNJqrnzLrxQmegtD1T8E-gdUkbfdaE=)

name: Salena Jegede, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Back in 1999...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
My team is counting on you. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa95f/34a064cc/ac339dd/70efe47/561392062/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - I moved to Georgia in 1999 to attend Spelman College. Georgia is where I met my husband. Where we chose to raise our son. Where I worked as an elementary school teacher. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa95f/34a064cc/ac339dd/70efe44/561392062/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE081418-full") Just like my family turned our house in Acworth into a home, Georgians have turned this state into my home. My friends and neighbors are loving, supportive, and driven people who I consider myself lucky to know. **[What I'm saying is: I love this state and the people who live here. That's why I'm working to elect Stacey Abrams our next governor. Will you make a donation to support our team today?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa95f/34a064cc/ac339dd/70efe44/561392062/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE081418-full")** As finance director, it's my job to make sure we are raising enough money to keep our campaign moving forward. We need to pay for campaign staff, volunteer training, and office supplies for our campaign headquarters. It's a lot of spreadsheets and phone calls (which I'm sure anyone but a finance director would find boring), but I love the work I do, because I know I'm helping to make Georgia a more welcoming and inclusive state for everyone. And my favorite part about working here: We've built a campaign that truly looks like Georgia! Our diverse team of strong (mostly women!) leaders is changing the face of what politics looks like in Georgia -- and I couldn't be prouder to be a part of that. **Georgians deserve a governor like Stacey who will work for them. So I 'm working as hard as I can _for her_ to make sure that on November 6th, we beat Brian Kemp and usher in a new era of progress in Georgia.** **[Are you with me? Make a donation today to help us get our campaign's unique message out to every corner of the state. Together, we will lead Georgia forward.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa95f/34a064cc/ac339dd/70efe44/561392062/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE081418-full")** Our success is entirely dependent on how many Georgians step up and help out. We're counting on you. Thank you, Salena Jegede
Finance Director
Stacey Abrams for Governor
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa95f/34a064cc/ac339dd/70efe44/561392062/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE081418-full")**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: This changes everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | **Breaking News: Libertarian Gary Johnson is running for Senate in New Mexico!**

Gary Johnson is a former New Mexico governor and presidential candidate with backers who could pour millions into his campaign. We need to fight back right now, .

**_[Contribute $29 now to our Rapid Response Fund->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-nomination-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+ask+now+to+our+Rapid+Response&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180814_1_1")_**

* * *

News just broke that Gary Johnson is officially challenging me for my Senate seat, and this changes _everything_.

Johnson, a former governor of New Mexico and presidential candidate, has a national network of wealthy donors to bankroll his campaign and a super PAC ready to flood the airwaves with ads against me.

**Johnson raised millions of dollars before, and the Libertarian Party is going to make sure he does it again.**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_

body:
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING: NBC reports Heidi Heitkamp 's Senate seat most likely to flip red! **
---
**[_Donate now to DOUBLE your gift, reelect Heidi in North Dakota and turn the Senate BLUE!_](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e5582/688a0c21/50758eb9/73af7518/3569475530/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGhoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTA3LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4hh?refcode=jtk1907-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
Friends -

Things are looking grim. If Heidi Heitkamp loses in North Dakota, Democrats stand no chance of taking back the Senate. And Heidi's seat is THE most likely to flip Republican - unless we act RIGHT NOW.

Heidi is the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the Senate, and the odds are stacked against her:
| | | | Heidi's race was the closest of 2012. She won by **fewer than 3,000 votes. ** |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Nineteen right-wing groups have already spent nearly $9 million on ads to defeat her. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | But a group of generous donors is matching all online gifts for ONE more day to help Heidi fight back against the GOP and win! |
---|---|---|---
**With just one day to go until this match expires, Heidi still NEEDS to raise another $7,883. The only way we can protect Heidi's seat and take back the Senate is if grassroots donors like you give right now to help Heidi hit this goal. **

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Yesterday's inscription was a suggestion...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I highly recommend he follow it.
#

Peter -
Yesterday, I joined protesters in Utica outside of a fundraiser with Donald Trump to deliver a special copy of my book _Corruption in America_ to the president.
Here's the inscription:
[](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ed4/6e822e2f/1a1d779b/41725f14/2389525566/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MTQtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180814-a")
You see, I wrote the book on corruption -- its history and the modern-day corruption that poisons our democracy, and I think Trump could learn a thing or two by reading it.
Yesterday's inscription was a suggestion, and I highly recommend he follow it. If not, then I promise that as the next New York Attorney General, **I will sue to stop his emoluments and force him to divest from his businesses as the Constitution requires.**
I'm ready to lead that fight, but I cannot do it alone. So I need to ask:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? I've rejected all corporate money because that only leads to more corruption. That's why your donation is so important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ed4/6e822e2f/1a1d779b/41725f14/2389525566/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MTQtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180814-a")**
Best,
Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ed4/6e822e2f/1a1d779b/41725f14/2389525566/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MTQtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180814-a")**

* * *

Peter - Yesterday, I joined protesters in Utica outside of a fundraiser with Donald Trump to deliver a special copy of my book Corruption in America to the president. Here's the inscription: "" You see, I wrote the book on corruption -- its history and the modern-day corruption that poisons our democracy, and I think Trump could learn a thing or two by reading it. Yesterday's inscription was a suggestion, and I highly recommend he follow it. If not, then I promise that as the next New York Attorney General, I will sue to stop his emoluments and force him to divest from his businesses as the Constitution requires. I'm ready to lead that fight, but I cannot do it alone. So I need to ask: "" Best, Zephyr "" * Paid for by Zephyr for NY 1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

subject: [Senate] 12 women to hold Trump's nominees accountable

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4978/24c69fd9/25bdc8085/18840436/4135064941/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact&source=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact")
---

Peter,

Flipping the Senate isn't _just_ about winning seats.

Senators have a crucial power: approval over the president's judicial nominees, like anti-choice judge Brett Kavanaugh, and members of his cabinet, like Jeff Sessions and Betsy DeVos.

Our senators are the first line of defense against dangerous and unqualified nominees.

That's why we've endorsed 12 pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for us in the Senate.

**[Donate $3 to help our women flip the Senate so they have approval over Trump's nominees.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4978/24c69fd9/25bdc8085/18840437/4135064941/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180814_email_TakeBackTheSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+our+women+flip+the+Sena&utm_campaign=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact&source=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact")**

When President Trump nominated Jeff Sessions to be attorney general, Senators Dianne Feinstein (CA), Kamala Harris (CA), Mazie Hirono (HI), and Amy Klobuchar (MN) were there to hold him accountable.

And when Trump nominated Betsy DeVos to be secretary of education, she had to face Senators Tammy Baldwin (WI), Maggie Hassan (NH), Patty Murray (WA), and Elizabeth Warren (MA).

With Trump's nomination of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court and _Roe v. Wade_ under threat, flipping the Senate is more important than ever.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women take back the Senate and hold Trump's nominees accountable:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hold-Nominees-Accountable](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4978/24c69fd9/25bdc8085/18840430/4135064941/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180814_email_TakeBackTheSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHoldNomineesAcco&utm_campaign=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact&source=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4978/24c69fd9/25bdc8085/18840431/4135064941/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180814_email_TakeBackTheSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact&source=WQEFET37N_digital_email_20180814_TakeBackSenate_inact")**

name: Leah
subject: hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test.

Friend, your support has helped us get here today.

Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test.

In less than 3 hours, the polls close. We’ll know who will take on Senator Baldwin in November.

And it'll be over.

**But we're not there just yet... we've still got to win this thing today. **

First off, if you need help finding your polling place, please visit **[myvote.wi.gov](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcIVAJyxctwavfYc9OZtX7TvkI5-EJ_RwmKHa7mDl22fH4Q3X9yVhsgysFsoRdYSZnTK4kjED6TaVxbu6QlB4XjJaYv7PTC0Fr9aVDWG33muXY_jE9kCtvUjQIWJQEf3QqYHVJ6b2yvBCyo3g9hxPff109etovL0yaXGxgYXUJsIv_vcY7jpwuazpjJ6zcEr7D4FqdHFiit0is4fWzVuivlmwCODNJJ67rqFZ5oGvbsjBlQq_p5IcfR-ZM08Cjj94VQ%3D%3D)** and remember to head to your voting location before 8 p.m. Don’t forget to take your photo ID with you!

But right now, we've got hundreds of volunteers in the field working to get out the vote and they're not stopping till polls close at 8.

I know today is a busy day for so many of us, but I have to ask you for a big favor, friend. [**Will you chip in $5, $10, or $50 for get out the vote efforts?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcHDl6FuGRK2FSlHQlKDCmLVZZlzw13kxikWHS6lhkOh1mVs9bVZnMw-8gZnjh-pIgZkZq6ROOEFieaEdcV22Q4hfTpj7N7_pzQtxsN-swWwIDSVz_Y922KCcP9lVs-y4dAPtjUZaDNXJ2zwayaDFjhQU4Ig3MM_dYogjTfEY92mvwMi8B-CLlBRBv-lD70owLCxJQlZkfn2uSY5gdLwlCA2bj5tmlnJHUIuQabOEwDvQbGkH9Op1FQpWi9vRpjaFH7Q8hkmDVWr0vJvSl-4jTS4ekrzWEADI0de-3hLVSWJUjdhMtBTpeb4WSsCa8zzPPAIbf6X3Au8rEgMCSKU1yijpTkX2RYGXpZ17UT7DR9kwIIUxY7HaAU84DqJNX5HDOD5sd08qrBYCyVt-B0u5JeY%3D)

Thank you for all of your help,

Leah

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=6rqkq_EXxrs1M8igpRNchLaA1ieMVXNWPaM9sk-EQzN6zlviAb4IH-CB54BU-ZeXSTqYmehnivA9_XKC83wPn_YKvgwuUjDr3n0LLbDclgWbDRIEq3d57MdvlWhp8P3K1jGUP0diWh4EQ4EXRiKOVYqkjLot7PBSgdCY-mmKTnbW32oNqaSETeQNaEMeZ2n7_Zr5-mIe_4mFz6dB-_ZoAbqrtauG_vvmN9OLwlwwPHpZqmHPUQb7Ih7t0BH-bKXA). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcKkoomBZp5jLzubgYzrK6WEgOYyAInwW0bp4kbZMsikSaF5htSJL4QxT8tYKaxuz_xyen37m0GL8MQT4nn782gDucAGYgbrZy7XMceUCsC9SkAAkHAArUo7YAAWw1GB2hbFGbIqoZ1a0th2Mx5pLdYBsK6lUp_anqeqNZk_s71CAiHMUtEFKn9BchKWEY_UaNHzVl9wOSwBdM5kkRmocEa-G9VNHKWpCFoAjns9HaWkIzf542zofx049MjqlWRBbubaQVkFU4dMVy2wsq3HPehdzkzN-noVlzg8JquUFT7qdBAuoyyFVBU4g-6EY0kcA1a1gudcm7p53y17wO0hXvFfg0YkGNd6__pxA2KvsMmV6) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcKkoomBZp5jLzubgYzrK6WHL2RJV4yPoQzLvgPXuX5IckCzQzmcIup4mDtR85jT1WNh9-fOt7As3ftG_dJSNUwhT1toLmi4PWr8aTIUEQ6CGztYg4ihYJxT4rzExWQFOMV6lX462K5thxc_Saj7_9qudVcDqriBhTPNENGxuPo8o3xOzqjcPQpuOmiT-O0yB1uqlATTtAW3EyerjnY_k67g0joUdGikYqxycU9x5eQld80nhL8N52uslmOFceETGdd-ChUM_KZK9Kicko8VLufsdD--FzdQHD5FDDfbFUwG57Rak0w_uRZqLvh88ZJuk34ddFilgy-BOuJNSlcGaNPEngfczCScIX0ZPKE4kH3L_) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcHPcEhTT44o8HCeEqX3G0iUh47j1jOEI_bCNpUYL8HkuoJbRZ5hvhh-ahGExkWIRbceoQFS8ruBHp7qSiPOeF7U7Ju2qMrSzcLqh_Ub4MxK90LlZJGeJ3wXNgrqINSN-SSAGIntIdykap_ANQyUBalK18lnaUviHGAINfwXoe8qGo7JJSXHdNk3qkvC3cVjdfjf_zZSqwYfO7FSZ_tpEJuiktdYX2-VNI253S_G6CeDSrTTRTVnAdNWEmMA5Az1FKg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcByenOTWtAfesn9reSpshgDRXcFwLt-mjmq8SBIJIlj-UBkTvSONwV0GBV0rJi3ujNhnJL18vK1v4rJZ6gMVTToxF_oB-2MPu51YP4RCN8U022W6dMBUvBGkt6xmSAzM9Sx9XQTMYyncXdnD6D_vXfSDDcnSetI3bbPL7IDDFDmF3gpNMs1gB8iBaktMMIX_kfGcVdoBTUF_3UcKyVJGa8OmWDXbx0yxb1Pw34t9WEkiVnxxbuEANOAhUrbXhTthSw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcO2sRNsfIciVFsEDlRapn4Fr5q1TIYoO3lm7TvQ1C4pvLTqzOtSONqCLIz6OguJZZCTkQnIWzOzoxsMpyFvjXP_9eIFqkoIPsp93MtC7NFh4k6xWHw9rcJMlQa3CQKOiLJZepVeMAOn5oTKGHHzzqdA5SkSy4zVER0gCD4fzgKrXT4NP-C1MR2V0WWOTBWh0EF70-6F8D9FTpJBrHqsHsGksxEmrLm1Fz-dZO3fXqLOkuJ06JijagymOBg3DIyARAw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=l8gXTJ9yfZr3CWVIc1zJcKkoomBZp5jLzubgYzrK6WFNC1HcLSDRtb0nWt_vd_0_Al3DudouI3rwPeB8kmsUZD35YYVtx2jmX7vP_gT2p2fA8eNFge7Gh2zU_AWw7irxZJmWaQr8HhPDqMiPM7LmsSXJ4DuFoVpxk3Mgvy05NQfPTsMzSoNph67JgUw3cn8BM6UMNdxCwfM0t_5n0EuaLrw2fK3xCZ9gv6FqcE6aUBf7bgK1Y_mSbStWRjpVB60tYsKCL7EFt_FdCGdppQ_eF9ovcItjGr4KYUh_EMs2rj0vi6jQHy1vfynjuoW-ewbTUr0Prtfcjac6BXYFytKKEl90PUtOf_gj6TpCX12GRh3VFRjCrSicEWAAbYnzgfXAnM02pMM_fmoWDg4OdwDtsg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=6rqkq_EXxrs1M8igpRNchLaA1ieMVXNWPaM9sk-EQzN6zlviAb4IH-CB54BU-ZeXSTqYmehnivA9_XKC83wPn_YKvgwuUjDr3n0LLbDclgWbDRIEq3d57MdvlWhp8P3K1jGUP0diWh4EQ4EXRiKOVYqkjLot7PBSgdCY-mmKTnbW32oNqaSETeQNaEMeZ2n7_Zr5-mIe_4mFz6dB-_ZoAbqrtauG_vvmN9OLwlwwPHpZqmHPUQb7Ih7t0BH-bKXA) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8c93eceb6ffd46a5835a239f0f224023&_e=6rqkq_EXxrs1M8igpRNchLaA1ieMVXNWPaM9sk-EQzN6zlviAb4IH-CB54BU-ZeXSTqYmehnivA9_XKC83wPn_YKvgwuUjDr3n0LLbDclgWbDRIEq3d57MdvlWhp8P3K1jGUP0diWh4EQ4EXRiKOVYqkjLot7PBSgdCY-mmKTnbW32oNqaSETeQNaEMeZ2n7_Zr5-mIe_4mFz6dB-_ZoAbqrtauG_vvmN9OLwlwwPHpZqmHPUQb7Ih7t0BH-bKXA) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test. Friend, your support has helped us get here today. Throughout this race, we’ve worked side by side to make sure we had the best chance of winning today’s primary - and now we’re down to our final test. In less than 3 hours, the polls close. We’ll know who will take on Senator Baldwin in November. And it'll be over. But we're not there just yet... we've still got to win this thing today. First off, if you need help finding your polling place, please visit and remember to head to your voting location before 8 p.m. Don’t forget to take your photo ID with you! But right now, we've got hundreds of volunteers in the field working to get out the vote and they're not stopping till polls close at 8. I know today is a busy day for so many of us, but I have to ask you for a big favor, friend. I am confident that all of our hard work will pay off, friend, and I hope my next email to you will be celebrating our hard-fought victory. Thank you for all of your help, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

| Friends:

We are excited to introduce a series of Tuesday Town Halls in the 4th Congressional District, with the first town hall to be held in Hot Springs next Tuesday, August 21st, at 6:00 p.m. at the Dierks Center of National Park College.

The focus will be healthcare and education. Hayden and a panel of local leaders will be on hand to answer audience questions and address concerns. Tuesday Town Halls are also in the works for Pine Bluff and El Dorado, so stay tuned!

We can't wait to see you next Tuesday!

The Hayden for Congress Team
